docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KIMBERLY PASSMORE, CORPORATE PARALEGAL. FILED BY DEFENDANT COINBASE INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY CHENEY, NORMAN COINBASE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-19-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NORMAN CHENEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COINBASE INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KIMBERLY PASSMORE, CORPORATE PARALEGAL. DEFENDANT IS GIVEN A COPY OF PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS TO REVIEW AND TO ALLOW THE PARTIES TO DISCUSS A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR IF NO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS REACHED AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED FOR PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $9345.21 PLUS COST OF $90 (ACCOMPANIED WITH A WRITTEN DECISION). JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2023 BY PANG LY. PER JUDGE PRO TEM NO APPEARANCE AND NO HEARING IS REQUIRED. JUDGEMENT WILL BE ENTERED PER MINUTES OF 4/19/23. JUDGE PRO TEM LY TO PREPARE A STATEMENT OF DECISION. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (506/JPT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHENEY, NORMAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COINBASE INC. PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHENEY, NORMAN AS TO DEFENDANT COINBASE INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY CHENEY, NORMAN COINBASE INC.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-19-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NORMAN CHENEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COINBASE INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KIMBERLY PASSMORE (CORPORATE PARALEGAL). THE CASE IS SET FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO 4-19-23 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506 FOR PARTIES TO EVALUATE FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. IF THERE IS NO APPEARANCE, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE ("DWP"). IF THERE IS AN APPEARANCE, HEARING WILL CONDUCT FOR JUDGEMENT DECISION. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETURNED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2023 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,345.21 FILED BY CHENEY, NORMAN AS TO DEFENDANT COINBASE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-14-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NORMAN CHENEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COINBASE INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KIMBERLY PASSMORE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PARTIES AGREED TO ATTEMPT TO WORK ON SETTLEMENT OUTSIDE COURT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MARCH 14, 2023 HEARING IF SETTLEMENT HAS NOT BEEN REACHED. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2023 - CONTINUED DUE THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO MAY-30-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN, NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CT CORPORATION SYSTEM] SERVED JAN-04-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COINBASE INC.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT FOR PARTIES TO EVALUATE FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
